title: pyrus insolita
side_effects: Pyrus insolita can have side effects if used improperly, such as rapid heartbeat, nausea, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can cause respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and coughing fits. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can lead to convulsions, seizures, and even coma in rare instances. Additionally, the plant's toxic properties can interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
